ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulation_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation scenario */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation scenario */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation scenario */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator who set up the scenario */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was created */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the simulation is taking place */,
  "traffic_density" TEXT /* Density of traffic in the simulation */,
  "vehicle_types" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of vehicle types included in the simulation */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day for the simulation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the simulation */,
  "real_time_data" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if real-time data is being used in the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_scenarios_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road segment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the road segment */,
  "start_block" INTEGER /* Starting block number of the segment */,
  "end_block" INTEGER /* Ending block number of the segment */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the road segment in kilometers */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the road segment in km/h */,
  "num_lanes" INTEGER /* Number of lanes on the road segment */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the road segment */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of road surface */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the road segment */,
  "pedestrian_path" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the road segment has a pedestrian path */,
  "bicycle_lane" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the road segment has a bicycle lane */,
  "lanes_direction" TEXT /* Direction of each lane */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intersections" (
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intersection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the intersection */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the intersection */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic control at the intersection (e.g., traffic lights, stop signs) */,
  "num_approaches" INTEGER /* Number of approaches to the intersection */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the intersection */,
  "pedestrian_crosswalks" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the intersection has pedestrian crosswalks */,
  "bike_lanes" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the intersection has bike lanes */,
  "public_transport_stops" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the intersection has public transport stops */,
  "emergency_routes" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the intersection is part of an emergency route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic control system */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where the control system is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of traffic control system (e.g., traffic lights, stop signs) */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for the traffic control system (e.g., fixed, adaptive) */,
  "control_status" TEXT /* Current status of the traffic control system */,
  "control_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of each control cycle */,
  "control_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the traffic control system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_controls_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, bus) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle in km/h */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin location of the vehicle */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination location of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "emission_class" TEXT /* Emission class of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the scenario */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the scenario was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, run) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES simulation_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road segment involved in the result */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection involved in the result */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "data" TEXT /* Raw data from the simulation */,
  "scenario_version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation scenario */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation result */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the simulation result */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the simulation result */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES simulation_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
